title: BTS: Behind the Scenes
overview: Behind The Scenes is a Kannada anthology film that tells five distinct stories, each directed by a different filmmaker: Prajwal MRs Baanigondu Elle Ellide, Sai Shrinidhis Coffee, Cigarettes and Lines, Kuldeep Cariappa NMs Hero, Rajesh N Shankadhs Blockbuster, and Apoorva S Bharadwajs SuMoha. Together, these narratives explore the deep influence of cinema on the lives of both creators and viewers, showing the sacrifices, dreams, and challenges filmmakers, actors, and crew members endure.
